title: artemisia vulgaris subsp. vulgaris
intro: Artemisia vulgaris subsp. vulgaris, commonly known as common mugwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of common mugwort include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and anxiety, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Common mugwort can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy for various health concerns.
